name: acronym
description: Generates an acronym from a given name by extracting the first letter of each word.
usage_guidelines: Use for creating initials from full names.
Useful for avatar placeholders when no image is available.
Works with multi-word names and handles edge cases.
Returns original name if no word boundaries are found.

params.name: name
params.description: The full name string to convert to acronym.

return_value.description: Acronym string composed of first letters of each word, or original name if no matches.

Do: Use for user initials in avatars
